questions.question: What are the advantages and disadvantages of deadlock detection compared to prevention?
keyPoints: Advantage: Doesn't require advance knowledge of resource needs
Advantage: Allows more flexible resource allocation
Disadvantage: Recovery has overhead and may lose work
Disadvantage: Detection algorithm has computational cost

questions.question: Describe the deadlock detection algorithm step-by-step and apply it to a given scenario with allocation, request, and available matrices.
keyPoints: Initialize Work = Available and mark all processes as unfinished
Find process where Request ≤ Work, update Work = Work + Allocation, mark as finished
Repeat until no such process exists
Check if all processes finished → no deadlock, else deadlock exists
Apply to specific example with correct calculations
